title: Hackathon live-window posture (CEO) + L2 tick/microstructure go-no-go before Jun 15 data drop
source: Discord organizer answers 2026-06-11 (rules verified); CLAUDE.md 'Hackathon context & strategy posture' section
why: CORRECTED 2026-06-11 from the official schedule (supersedes the earlier 'Jun 22-24 / ~3 days / equity-rank' read). STRATEGY FREEZE at 22:00 BST Sun Jun 21: live paper trading begins and NO further modifications are allowed; strategies run autonomously Jun 21->26. First-round elimination 24-jun 22:00 BST ranks on RISK-ADJUSTED RETURNS (Sharpe-like, not raw equity) -> Top 100 advance. Final close 26-jun 22:00 BST: org force-liquidates everything and computes final P&L + Sharpe. Finals 27-jun = presentation only, NO trading. Window is ~5 days (Jun 21 22:00 -> 26), variance-dominated for the bar-based pipeline (D1 ~5 bars, H4 ~30). Two consequences invalidate parts of operations-runbook §6: (i) 'no modifications' may forbid the entire mid-week operator-intervention playbook (aggression ladder, manual --flatten-at, lottery arming on 25-jun) -> pre-arm at launch or drop; (ii) the cut ranking on risk-adjusted returns kills Decision 1's 'flatten to lock the equity number' and makes the 'crypto-only into the Sat final' branch moot. Two prizes still fit our strengths: Best Sharpe $10k (survival book + PSR/DSR) and Best Technical Architecture $10k (Loop A + lookahead firewall + DA/skeptic).
value_rationale: $20k of the prize pool is directly addressable by the existing stack; the 3-day window decision gates all remaining prep work.
scope: RESOLVE the scope of 'no further modifications' (Jun 21 22:00 BST freeze) against official rules / #support: does it forbid mid-week operator interventions (aggression ladder, manual --flatten-at, lottery arming, --clear/--reset)? If strict, the §6.1/§6.2 playbook must be PRE-ARMED at launch (<= Jun 21 22:00) or dropped.

RE-DECIDE Decision 1 (runbook §6.1): the 24-jun cut ranks on RISK-ADJUSTED RETURNS, not an equity snapshot, so 'flatten before the print to lock the equity number' no longer applies; pick the flatten-vs-hold rationale that actually helps a Sharpe-like cut (small positive return at low vol; a dead-flat book ranks poorly).

DROP/REWRITE Decision 2 (runbook §6.1): 'crypto-only into the Sat 27-jun final' is MOOT - org liquidates everything at 26-jun 22:00 BST and there is no Jun-27 trading; the only real choice is variance control on the final mark (self-flatten 30-60 min early vs take the org liquidation price).
CEO decision (a): intraday/L2 microstructure build go-no-go - if GO, scope a minimal tick ingestion + L2 feature layer as its own B-ID before Jun 15.
CEO decision (b): live posture under the 30:1 cap - survival-book Sharpe-discipline (default, now strongly favored since the cut itself is risk-adjusted) vs an equity-rank variance play.
Prep the Best-Sharpe play: confirm the competition's exact Sharpe / risk-adjusted-return definition matches our live-book measurement (ask #support if ambiguous).
Prep the Best-Architecture play: 1-page architecture narrative (Loop A, firewall, DA/skeptic, execution layer) for the top-25 presentation.
On Jun 15: parse the tick/L2 CSV schema drop and re-assess decision (a) with real data in hand.
recommendation: AUTHORITATIVE RULES RECONCILED 2026-06-16 (see CLAUDE.md authoritative block + memory project_hackathon; SUPERSEDES all earlier equity-vs-Sharpe and 'no-modifications freeze' reads in this ticket's why/scope). METRIC = composite PER ROUND: 0.70 ReturnRank + 0.15 DrawdownRank + 0.10 SharpeRank + 0.05 RiskDiscipline (0-100 percentile among active participants); Return dominates but 30% rewards low DD / consistent Sharpe / risk discipline. Sharpe = non-annualized on 15-min equity returns (std=0 ->0; <8 obs caps SharpeRank at 50). SCHEDULE: launch 21 Jun 22:00; R1/R2/R3 end 22/23/24 Jun 22:00 BST; Top 100 -> Final 24->26 Jun (BLINDED, own account only); 27 Jun = results+awards, NO trading. RED-LINE (sec14): forced liquidation = IMMEDIATE elimination -> any bold/variance play must GUARANTEE no margin call (isolated latched sleeve). RISK DISCIPLINE (sec13) resets each round; directional trading explicitly permitted, only prolonged near-full-leverage concentration penalized. TRANSPARENCY (sec8): Jun21-24 near-real-time leaderboard + PEER logs/positions/risk at 5-min latency (observe mu_field LIVE); Final Jun24-26 BLINDED; prep Jun15-21 trading DISABLED (no paper leaderboard to pre-calibrate). NO strategy-freeze clause exists -> mid-round adaptation appears ALLOWED -> re-opens rank-conditional live-adjusted play (the earlier 'pre-arm everything at the freeze' assumption is likely wrong; confirm in #rules-and-faq). RESOLVED: metric, freeze scope, schedule, Sharpe convention. STILL OPEN (#rules-and-faq): per-round qualifier counts (rules say TBC; the 200/150/100 from the overview are UNCONFIRMED; field ~520); explicit confirmation that mid-round modifications are allowed; exact equity-mark cadence for the 15-min Sharpe. POSTURE: barbell endorsed but gated on edge (decision dial B0182; sim B0183/B0187). OSR/L2 third leg: NO-GO evidence has CONVERGED (B0184 event-starved + B0188 depth-parity-FALSE), CEO go/no-go pending at the Jun-18 gate.

history.reason: CEO recall 2026-06-11: official schedule corrects timeline - freeze Jun 21 22:00 (no modifications), cut on risk-adjusted returns Jun 24, final close+liquidation Jun 26, no Jun-27 trading; invalidates runbook §6 Decision 1/2 + mid-week intervention playbook
history.from: Live trading is ONLY Jun 22-24 (~3 days): D1 sees ~3 bars, H4 ~18 - equity rank is mostly variance for the bar-based pipeline. Platform drops ~1 month of tick-level data with >=5-level order-book depth on Jun 15 and streams the same L2 live; we have zero microstructure tooling. Two prizes fit our actual strengths better than equity rank: Best Sharpe $10k (survival book + PSR/DSR apparatus) and Best Technical Architecture $10k (Loop A + lookahead firewall + adversarial review). Two RESERVED-to-CEO decisions must be made before Jun 15: (a) build intraday/microstructure on the L2 ticks or stay bar-based; (b) equity-aggression vs Sharpe-discipline posture for the live window.

history.reason: From the L2 methodology survey + pre-registration: questions to resolve in #rules-and-faq after Jun-15: (1) exact Sharpe computation convention for the leaderboard (equity-mark frequency); (2) whether CSV/live volume field is real volume or tick count; (3) fill simulator behavior for passive/resting orders (if exchange-grade, maker strategies re-enter consideration per survey); (4) cut time verification 18:00 vs 22:00 BST (pre-existing); (5) whether mid-week operator interventions count as forbidden modifications (pre-existing, gates runbook 6.1/6.2 pre-arming).

CEO adopted the Fable 5 BARBELL posture (2026-06-13), superseding the conservative survival-book-only default. Stage 1 (Jun21 22:00->24) survival book to survive the cut + Best Sharpe; Stage 2 (Jun25->26) deliberate variance via the isolated lottery sleeve (B0150) at US PCE; Best Technical Architecture in parallel. Persisted to docs/submission/barbell-strategy.md; CLAUDE.md + operations-runbook + memory updated. RESOLVES decision (b) live posture = barbell (was 'survival-book Sharpe-discipline vs equity-rank variance play'). Build audit 2026-06-13: lottery sleeve DONE (74+ tests, own latch), equity-lock/crypto-only DONE, OSR/L2 built+frozen pre-data (gated Jun-18), 0 directional Loop-A survivors (Stage 1 stays survival-book). STILL OPEN: which Stage-2 aggression rung to pre-commit at the freeze (CEO, launch-time under strict no-modifications); OSR/L2 deploy at Jun-18 gate (CEO).

Discord ~2026-06-12 (Duncan) partially answers the queued rules questions: (metric) 'the primary ranking metric will be PnL' with risk controls + trading constraints to prevent excessive directional bets; full rules + evaluation criteria to be published before the event -> CONTRADICTS the schedule's 'risk-adjusted returns' (Sharpe-like) cut; unresolved, treat as load-bearing. (fills) order-book matching model, real book as INPUT to a simulation (not the live production book); maker AND taker both supported (limit + marketable orders) -> re-opens passive/maker strategies (answers survey Q3) and validates the OSR/L2 book. STILL OPEN: exact PnL/Sharpe computation convention; whether mid-week operator interventions count as forbidden modifications; cut time 18:00 vs 22:00 BST; CSV/live volume field semantics.
CEO adopted barbell; Discord clarified metric (PnL-contested) + fill model (maker/taker)

AUTHORITATIVE official competition overview received 2026-06-15 (supersedes the Discord-derived timeline). RESOLVES the load-bearing contradictions: (1) LIVE WINDOW is Jun 21->Jun 24 ONLY (3 days), NOT Jun 21 22:00->26. (2) THREE daily elimination rounds, each ranked on ACCOUNT EQUITY at round end (NOT risk-adjusted/Sharpe): R1 Jun21 23:00->Jun22 22:00 BST Top200; R2 Jun22 22:00->Jun23 22:00 Top150; R3 Jun23 22:00->Jun24 22:00 Top100->Finals. (3) RANKING METRIC RESOLVED = account equity (FAQ 'How is the winner determined': rankings based on account equity at end of each round). Duncan's 'PnL' was right vs the schedule's 'risk-adjusted'. Best Sharpe $10k + Best Architecture $10k remain SEPARATE side prizes (confirmed identical prize table). (4) NO TRADING Jun 25-26 -> the barbell Stage-2 US-PCE (Thu Jun25 13:30) lottery has NO VENUE; Stage 2 as designed is INVALIDATED. (5) No Jun-26 org force-liquidation event; trading simply ends Jun24 22:00 BST. (6) Finals Jun27: 'final rankings determined' - details TBD, do NOT assume presentation-only. (7) Round 1 starts 23:00 (11pm) BST, not 22:00. STILL OPEN for #rules-and-faq: whether re-tuning is allowed in the overnight gaps BETWEEN rounds (now load-bearing - determines if conservative R1/R2 then variance for R3 is legal); exact equity-mark timing; Jun-27 finals format.
add_link spawned->B0181

CORRECTION to the 2026-06-15 overview annotation (CEO reconciliation same day): the public overview describes only the first leg. Full structure: (2A) three daily equity-ranked rounds Jun 21 23:00 -> Jun 24 22:00 BST -> Top 200/150/100; (2B) the Top 100 KEEP TRADING Jun 24 22:00 -> Jun 26 22:00 BST, narrowing to Top 25 finalists -- Jun 26 22:00 is the real final close (matches the original schedule); (3) Jun 27 London = in-person finals event for the 25, no trading. So there IS trading Jun 25-26 -> barbell Stage 2 (US-PCE Jun 25 lottery) venue is INTACT; B0181 discarded (false premise). RESOLVED: the three Jun 21-24 rounds rank on ACCOUNT EQUITY (overview FAQ). STILL OPEN: the metric governing the Jun 24->26 finalist narrowing + the final 1st-25th prize rank (original schedule said P&L + Sharpe); whether re-tuning is allowed in the overnight gaps between rounds.
add_link spawned->B0182

Add to #rules-and-faq list (highest value): (a) FIELD SIZE / number of entrants -- calibrates the entire Stage-1 risk level since the three rounds are equity-RANK cuts (Top 200/150/100), not absolute thresholds; (b) confirm whether the Jun 24->26 finalist leg and final 1st-25th rank use account equity or the schedule's old 'P&L + Sharpe'; (c) between-round modification allowance (overnight gaps). Spawned B0182 for the Stage-1 numerator calibration this implies (flat survival book = slow elimination under equity ranking).

FIELD SIZE RESOLVED 2026-06-15 (CEO): ~520 competitors. Cut math: R1 520->200 = top 38.5% after ~1 day (THE WALL); R2 200->150 = top 75%; R3 150->100 = top 67%; finalist leg 100->top 25. R2/R3 are gentle among already-culled survivors -> the survival book's 'don't blow up' thesis is strong there. The binding constraint is R1: getting into the top 200 on day one.

Live MT5 connection probed 2026-06-16 (read-only): account 10251 / FTWorldwide-MainTrade / $1M / 1:30, trade_allowed=False (prep, flips at launch). ALL 8 assets incl CRYPTO (BTC/ETH/SOL) tradable live (crypto absent from the parquet drop but present live). Full contract specs captured (margin=notional/30; negative overnight swaps on XAU/XAG/BTC/ETH/SOL ~-2.2 long/lot/night -> carry cost over the 5 nights). CRITICAL: live L2 DOM NOT provided (market_book unavailable) + no direct API -> live = top-of-book only -> spawned B0185. Contest-server bar history is shallow (~days); deep backtest uses parquet + prior datasets.
Reconcile actionable guidance to the AUTHORITATIVE competition rules (received 2026-06-16); supersede the stale risk-adjusted-cut / no-modifications-freeze reading.

history.reason: B0182 (now bold-during-cuts) rung/trigger finalization is GATED on this ticket: the ONE open item that matters is whether mid-round modification is allowed during R1-R3. The authoritative rules (2026-06-16) state NO strategy-freeze clause exists -> mid-round adaptation appears ALLOWED, but it needs EXPLICIT confirmation in #rules-and-faq (CEO/Discord action). Branch A (allowed): rank-conditional bold, read mu_field live from 5-min peer logs. Branch B (strict): pre-commit ~0.06 blind on the fair prior. Both are §14-safe.

RESOLVED 2026-06-16 (CEO relays org confirmation): MID-ROUND ADJUSTMENT IS ALLOWED during the elimination phase. This was THE load-bearing open item. Consequences: (1) the runbook sec6 pre-arm-everything-frozen-autonomous assumption is officially RELAXED -> we can adapt live in R1-R3; (2) unblocks B0182 -> finalize Branch A (rank-conditional, read mu_field from the 5-min peer logs, switch bold by RANK not calendar); (3) re-opens live-adjusted play generally. Still-minor-open: per-round qualifier counts (TBC), equity-mark cadence.

CEO RATIFIED the authoritative competition rules 2026-06-17 (composite metric per round, schedule launch Jun21 22:00 -> R1/R2/R3 -> Top100 -> blinded final Jun24-26, sec14 forced-liq=elimination, mid-round mods allowed). Residual organizer-side TBCs (per-round qualifier counts, equity-mark cadence) are external unknowns, not launch blockers.
CEO ratified rules 2026-06-17; posture=barbell (B0182 handles the rung), OSR/L2=NO-GO. Closed.

CEO accepted '15 DEFINED / 8 EFFECTIVELY TRADED' 2026-06-17. Deployed survival book UNIVERSE=15 (commit e2fd501) but the contest broker serves only 5-6 D1 bars for the 7 new symbols (AUD/CAD/CHF/EURCHF/EURGBP/XRP/BAR, listed ~Jun 11-12) -> the inverse-vol/cov engine safely zero-weights all 7 for the whole ~5-day contest; effective book = the 8 deep-history incumbents. Force-weighting off thin data rejected as unsafe. New symbols wired + hard-capped -> auto-participate if history ever deepens. Lottery sleeve unchanged at BTC/ETH/SOL.

risk-officer (Opus) review of 15-asset book expansion (e2fd501) = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, no blockers. Confirmed on REAL deployed data: 7 thin symbols exactly +0.0000 weight / zero orders; deep-8 sized normally (gross 0.429x, crypto var-share 0.25, eff bets 3.10); ragged-calendar fix holds (deep book not starved by stale tails). 4 eyes-open items: (1) MED thin-symbol zeroing is a DATA THRESHOLD (>=120 total bars), not a hard lock -> auto-admits at ~125 bars; safe this contest (~10x margin) but => FREEZE MUST NOT be re-run vs a deeper mid-contest data pull (backfill auto-admits). (2) MED parity tests NOT migrated to 15-universe (still pin old 8; guarantee intact via shared SSOT seam, but 15-univ not exercised by live-vs-backtest replay; commit msg overstates) -> add a 15-univ parity test + fix msg. (3) LOW BARUSD 0.02 is a hard accident-bound, recommend 0.00 target + perma cov-exclusion. (4) LOW no regression test for the ragged-tail bug. Live-monitor: watch 5-min metrics for any thin symbol nearing admission; gross<=0.5, crypto var ~0.25.

OFFICIAL CLARIFICATION from Lotus(Syphonix), 2026-06-23 ~03:05. (1) CONFIRMS the composite is Final Score = 0.70*ReturnRank + 0.15*DrawdownRank + 0.10*SharpeRank + 0.05*RiskDiscipline — NEVER PnL-alone; explicitly designed so the contest is NOT 'whoever takes the most extreme risk wins' (drawdown control, return stability, risk discipline carry significant weight). (2) Max Drawdown scope = 'within the given round / current round', built in from day one. (3) Risk Discipline calculated independently per round and RESETS at the start of each round. (4) NEW/EXPANDED ADDENDUM: the Sharpe ratio, Maximum Drawdown, AND Risk Discipline are ALL evaluated independently per elimination round and reset automatically at the inception of each round. (Return is NOT named in the reset list -> remains CUMULATIVE from the $1M start per section12.) (5) Red-line violations (forced liquidation, exploiting vulns, API abuse, multi-account, RANKING MANIPULATION) BYPASS the reset -> immediate elimination/DQ. STRATEGIC READ: validates the survival-book + section14-bounded barbell; warns against any UNBOUNDED variance play. Per-round reset of Sharpe/DD/RiskDiscipline STRENGTHENS the B0215 fix case (the corrected lower-vol/better-Sharpe 5-leg book competes better on the 30% non-return weight, refreshed each round) and clarifies ideal deploy timing: at/just-after a round boundary (also satisfies the risk-officer 'away from snapshot' caveat).
